name: Eight Pepper Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into medium sized chunks.
2. Chop the onion and peppers.
3. Crush the garlic.
4. In a large pan (about 6 quarts, non-reactive), cook the beef, onions, peppers, and garlic until the beef is browned.
5. Add Worcestershire sauce and Tabasco sauce.
6. Cook until vegetables are tender. Do not drain!
7. Stir in tomatoes, tomato sauce, and beans.
8. Add remaining spices: basil, oregano, white pepper, tabasco, Mexene chili powder, and cumin.
9. Reduce heat to low and cook covered for 1-2 hours, stirring occasionally.
10. Serve with tortilla chips, shredded cheddar cheese, and sour cream.
